base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of font_palette_pink — a ui (typography) from 1980 pac man. Pink-tinted font variant — used for Pinky/SPEEDY label. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Pink-tinted font variant — used for Pinky/SPEEDY label; also nickname quoted strings ''PINKY'' etc
